summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Transbordo module changes: Equipment section implementation, TROCA option removal from cargo inspection, and Equipment Models configuration section

integration_issues.issue: Application not accessible via external preview URL (https://admpsy-saas-integrado-jqgj.preview.emergentagent.com) - shows 'Preview Unavailable' message
integration_issues.note: Application works perfectly when accessed locally via file:// protocol

passed_tests: ✅ Module selector loads correctly with all 4 modules (Transbordo, Logística Interna, Logística Externa, Visão Geral)
✅ Transbordo module loads and displays correct form structure
✅ EQUIPAMENTOS section is present and replaces 'Inspeção do Equipamento'
✅ EQUIPAMENTOS section contains all required fields: Nº Série, Modelo, Data Certificação, Vencimento Certif, Nº Eslinga, Data Cert. Eslinga, Observações, Fotos, Status
✅ '+ ADICIONAR EQUIPAMENTO' button is present and functional
✅ Equipment cards are created successfully when clicking add button
✅ Equipment status options (APROVADO, REPROVADO, PENDENTE) are working
✅ TROCA option has been completely removed from cargo inspection questions
✅ Cargo inspection shows only SIM, NÃO, N/A options (no TROCA)
✅ Tipo de Carga dropdown works correctly (Contentores/IBCs-Tambores)
✅ Inspection questions update correctly when switching cargo types
✅ Contentores inspection shows 11 questions, IBCs/Tambores shows 10 questions
✅ Configurações tab is accessible in Transbordo module
✅ 'Modelos de Equipamentos' section exists in Configurações
✅ All configuration sections present: Clientes, Responsáveis, Produtos, Modelos de Equipamentos
✅ Model input field and add button are present in configuration
✅ Configuration sections have proper input fields and add buttons
action_item_for_main_agent: External URL access issue - the application is not accessible via the external preview URL, though it works perfectly locally. This may be a deployment/routing configuration issue that needs to be resolved for user access.
